subject: Export ChatGLM2-6B trace using torch.export
description:
Attempt to run torch_export.py on chatglm2-6b model from ~/pos/weights/chatglm2-6b. This will likely fail due to:
1. Custom config keys (multi_query_group_num vs num_key_value_heads)
2. Sequence-first layout [S,B,H]
3. Custom RoPE implementation
4. Possible missing rope_theta

Identify what breaks and what patches are needed.
